description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3.5.4-jdk-8 Docker image and defines a global before_script which runs: git config user.email "builds@dietsodasoftware.com", git config user.name "Diet Soda GitLab CI", installs openssh-client if missing (apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client -y), starts ssh-agent (eval $(ssh-agent -s)), adds the SSH_PRIVATE_KEY (ssh-add <(echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY")), creates ~/.ssh, and disables strict host key checking when running inside Docker (writes a config file). Set a global cache for the Maven repository at .m2/repository and repeat the same cache definition inside the release_artifact job. Define variables MAVEN_OPTS, MVN_CLI_OPTS, PROJECT_BRANCH and REVISION as shown. Add a single deploy stage containing a release_artifact job that runs only on the master branch, uses the environment named "apple-sauce" with URL "apple-sauce-url", and executes the script ./bintray_release.sh. Ensure the job inherits the Maven cache and the defined variables.
